title: Settings legal links open in-app browser via backend HTML pages
description: Settings rows (About / Terms / Legal Notice / Privacy) currently push a Flutter page that fetches JSON content and renders it as raw text — empty/missing content shows a snackbar. Switch to: backend exposes GET v1/legal/:key.html serving a public HTML page rendered from the admin-entered content; mobile opens that URL in an in-app browser (flutter_inappwebview).

title: [Reel] Pause when leaving screen, resume on tap (audio overlap)
description: Reel keeps playing audio after leaving screen. Scenario: play reel on Home, go to profile, open a reel -> two audios play at once. Reel should pause when leaving screen and resume on tap.
close_reason: home_page gates ReelViewerWidget.active on shell TabsRouter.activeIndex==0 via listener, so Home reels pause when leaving the Home shell tab.

title: [Categories] Shoe size region (US/EU/UK) selector not switching representation
description: Shoe sizes (Men/Women/Kids) should switch displayed representation by region. Region-selector button exists but selecting a region does not change displayed size representation.
close_reason: preferred_size_page now filters chips via _visibleSizes by selected EU/US/UK system; region-agnostic (clothing) sizes always shown.

title: [Sign-in] Phone login shows Get Started briefly after captcha
description: After entering phone, web view captcha opens. On completion it briefly shows Get Started page (wrong — phone button should stay loading), then navigates to OTP. Keep loading state until OTP nav.
notes: Partial: phone button now stays loading through AuthCodeSent (no bare-button gap before OTP push). BUT the reported 'Get Started (Welcome) page flashes after captcha' has no static root cause — verifyPhoneNumber's reCAPTCHA webview doesn't touch Flutter nav, and no global authStateChanges listener navigates to Welcome. Needs on-device repro + nav-stack/log capture to find what pushes WelcomeRoute.
close_reason: Root cause: Firebase phone reCAPTCHA returns on reversed-client-id URL scheme; deepLinkBuilder passed it through -> '*' redirect -> '/' -> OnboardingGuard pushed WelcomeRoute over PhonePage (flash), then OTP pushed. Fix: deepLinkBuilder returns DeepLink.none for any non-app scheme (empty/klozy/http/https still route). Plus phone button stays loading through AuthCodeSent. No associated-domain change needed.

title: [Chat] Audio timer glitch on pending audio
description: After sending one audio message, timer on another pending audio runs far too fast. Likely shared/leaked Timer not cancelled.
close_reason: chat_composer _startRecording: early-return if already recording + cancel stray timer before arming, preventing stacked periodic timers (2x counter).

title: [Profile] Propagate edit-profile updates everywhere via EventBus
description: After saving profile info, all screens showing that data should update via EventBus.
notes: Core tab case fixed: AccountBloc now subscribes to ProfileChangedEvent and re-fires AccountBootstrapRequested, so Chat/Profile tabs re-resolve incompleteOnboarding->valid after completing profile via Edit Profile (or onboarding) without a restart. Still open only if a specific NON-account-status screen stays stale.

title: [Chat] First message stuck in infinite loading
description: Very first chat message spins forever though delivered. After leaving/returning it shows sent; subsequent messages normal. Likely first-thread creation race / stream not updating optimistic message state.
close_reason: chat_entry now awaits OpenOrCreateThread before pushing thread route, so the conversation doc exists when the messages stream subscribes (was: denied listen left first optimistic msg stuck 'sending').

title: [Account tab] Blank screen when profile incomplete
description: When profile not complete, Account tab is fully blank. Should show 'Finish setting up your profile' placeholder (IncompleteProfilePlaceholderWidget).
close_reason: profile_page now branches incompleteOnboarding -> IncompleteProfilePlaceholderWidget (moved to core/account/ for reuse).

title: [Auth] Do not navigate after signup until signup fully done
description: Navigation to ShellRoute happens before auth/account state fully resolved. Ensure nav only after signup complete and account status resolved.
close_reason: AuthSuccess only emits after signup+getMe complete; nav now also re-bootstraps account first. Shell tabs show loader during AccountResolving.

title: [Chat] Login placeholder shows right after signup instead of Finish-profile
description: Immediately after signup, Chat tab shows guest login placeholder. Root cause: login/otp pages navigate to ShellRoute without firing AccountBootstrapRequested, so AccountBloc holds stale guest status. Works after hot restart. Fix: re-bootstrap AccountBloc after auth success.
close_reason: Fire AccountBootstrapRequested in login_page + otp_page AuthSuccess listeners before navigating to ShellRoute, so the singleton AccountBloc re-resolves past guest.

title: Native chat revamp (kill kosmos_chat, pixel-perfect to chat-design)
description: Implement 2026-06-21-native-chat-revamp-design.md. Replace kosmos_chat island with native Clean-Arch+BLoC chat, Firestore-compatible, pixel-perfect to chat-design/Klozy Chat.dc.html. Remove kosmos_chat + riverpod/screenutil/easy_localization deps + bridge. Phases: domain entities, data (responses/mappers/datasource/repo), usecases, blocs, pixel-perfect UI, rewire entry/shell/routes, dep surgery, l10n+gen+analyze.

value: Chat feature fully rewritten natively (2026-06-21): new Firestore collection 'chat' (NOT tchat) — doc shape {participantIds[], participants{uid:{userId,displayName,avatarUrl,rating,isPro}}, lastMessage{text,type,senderId}, lastMessageAt, unreadCounts{uid:int}, blockedBy[], deletedFor[]} + subcollection messages{id,conversationId,senderId,type,text,media[],replyTo,offer,purchase,readBy[],createdAt}. Single-query list, denormalized, per-user unread counters. Clean-Arch+BLoC, zero kosmos. mobile/packages/ DELETED. Backend api/src/commerce/firestore-chat.service.ts writes the 'chat' collection. Route param renamed tchatId->conversationId.

record (voice) pinned to 5.0.5 generation via dependency_overrides in mobile/pubspec.yaml. record 7.x/record_android 2.x fails Android Kotlin build ('Unresolved reference AdtsContainer'); record 5.2.x pulls record_platform_interface 1.6.0 which stale record_linux 0.7.2 can't implement (mobile build type-checks ALL federated platform Dart). Fix: pin record:5.0.5 + interface:1.0.2 + record_android:1.1.0 + web:1.0.4 + windows:1.0.2 + darwin:1.0.1 + linux:0.7.2. Do NOT bump record without re-testing the Android build.
